title: Only Zombies Spawn
description: Makes only zombies spawn in the world by preventing all other hostile mobs from spawning, including from spawners.
body:
# Only Zombies Spawn

Only Zombies Spawn is a simple mod that makes **zombies the only hostile mob that can spawn**.

All other hostile mobs are blocked from spawning, including mobs spawned by **mob spawners**.  
This keeps gameplay straightforward and creates a world where hostile encounters are focused entirely on zombies.

## Features

- Only **zombies** can spawn as hostile mobs
- Prevents all other hostile mobs from spawning naturally
- Prevents all other hostile mobs from spawning from **spawners**
- Keeps the concept simple and easy to understand
- Designed for players who want a zombie-only survival experience

## Supported Versions

- **Forge 1.20.1**
- **NeoForge 1.21.1**
- **NeoForge 26.1**

## Notes

- This mod is intended to make hostile mob spawning zombie-only
- Friendly and neutral mobs are not the focus of this mod
- Built for lightweight, easy-to-use gameplay customization

## Perfect For

- Zombie-themed survival worlds
- Custom modpacks
- Challenge runs
- Simple hostile mob control
